== A ==

{{Glossary:A-Factor}}

{{Glossary:Acquisition rate}}

{{Glossary:Active recall}}

{{Glossary:Ancestor}}

{{Glossary:Auto-postpone}}

{{Glossary:Auto-sort}}

== B ==

{{Glossary:Back-retention}}

{{Glossary:Binary component}} 

{{Glossary:Branch}} 

{{Glossary:Browser}}

{{Glossary:Burden}}

== C ==

{{Glossary:Category}}

{{Glossary:Child}}

{{Glossary:Cloze deletion}}

{{Glossary:Cloze for pictures}}

{{Glossary:Cloze interval}}

{{Glossary:Collection}}

{{Glossary:Component}}

{{Glossary:Computational spaced repetition}}

{{Glossary:Concept}}

{{Glossary:Concept group}}

{{Glossary:Concept map}}

{{Glossary:Consolidation}}

{{Glossary:Contents window}}

== D ==

{{Glossary:D-Factor}}

{{Glossary:Delay}}

{{Glossary:Descendant}}

{{Glossary:Difficulty}}

{{Glossary:Dismiss}}

{{Glossary:Dismissed element}}

{{Glossary:Dragging mode}}

{{Glossary:DSR model}}

== E ==

{{Glossary:E-Factor}}

{{Glossary:Editing mode}}

{{Glossary:Element}}

{{Glossary:Element browser}}

{{Glossary:Element subset}}

{{Glossary:Element window}}

{{Glossary:Extract}}

== F ==

{{Glossary:Filespace}}

{{Glossary:Filespace slot}}

{{Glossary:Final drill}}

{{Glossary:Final drill queue}}

{{Glossary:Flashcard}}

{{Glossary:Forget}}

{{Glossary:Forgetting curve}}

{{Glossary:Forgetting index}}

{{Glossary:Free running sleep}}

== G ==

{{Glossary:Grade}}

{{Glossary:Graphic cloze deletion}}

{{Glossary:Graphic deletion}}

== H ==

{{Glossary:Hierarchy}}

{{Glossary:Hierarchy node/branch/leaf}}

{{Glossary:Hint}}

{{Glossary:Hook node}}

{{Glossary:Hyperlink}}

== I ==

{{Glossary:Incremental audio}}

{{Glossary:Incremental learning}}

{{Glossary:Incremental reading}}

{{Glossary:Incremental video}}

{{Glossary:Incremental writing}}

{{Glossary:Interval}}

{{Glossary:Item}}

== K ==

{{Glossary:Knowledge tree}}

== L ==

{{Glossary:Lapse}}

{{Glossary:Layout}}

{{Glossary:Leaf}}

{{Glossary:Leech}}

{{Glossary:Leitner system}}

{{Glossary:Level}}

{{Glossary:Link}}

== M ==

{{Glossary:Matrix smoothing}}

{{Glossary:Measured forgetting index}}

{{Glossary:Memorize}}

{{Glossary:Memorized element}}

{{Glossary:Memory lapse}}

{{Glossary:Mid-interval repetition}}

{{Glossary:Minimum information principle}}

{{Glossary:Mnemonic hyperspace}}

== N ==

{{Glossary:Neural creativity}}

{{Glossary:Neural queue}}

{{Glossary:Neural review}}

{{Glossary:Node}}

== O ==

{{Glossary:O-Factor}}

{{Glossary:OF matrix}}

{{Glossary:Occlusion test}}

{{Glossary:Optimum interval}}

{{Glossary:Ordinal number}}

{{Glossary:Outstanding element}}

{{Glossary:Outstanding material}}

{{Glossary:Outstanding queue}}

{{Glossary:Overload}}

== P ==

{{Glossary:Parent}}

{{Glossary:Passive review}}

{{Glossary:Pending element}}

{{Glossary:Pending queue}}

{{Glossary:Post-lapse stability}}

{{Glossary:Presentation mode}}

{{Glossary:Primary storage}}

{{Glossary:Priority}}

{{Glossary:Priority bias}}

{{Glossary:Priority queue}}

== Q ==

{{Glossary:Q&amp;A format}}

== R ==

{{Glossary:R-Factor}}

{{Glossary:R-Metric}}

{{Glossary:RF matrix}}

{{Glossary:Read-point}}

{{Glossary:Reading list}}

{{Glossary:Recall matrix}}

{{Glossary:Recognition}}

{{Glossary:Registry}}

{{Glossary:Registry index}}

{{Glossary:Registry member}}

{{Glossary:Registry object}}

{{Glossary:Registry position}}

{{Glossary:Registry subset}}

{{Glossary:Registry window}}

{{Glossary:Remember}}

{{Glossary:Remembered element}}

{{Glossary:Repetition}}

{{Glossary:Repetition category}}

{{Glossary:Repetition spacing}}

{{Glossary:Requested forgetting index}}

{{Glossary:Retention}}

{{Glossary:Retrievability}}

{{Glossary:Review}}

{{Glossary:Root node}}

== S ==

{{Glossary:Script}}

{{Glossary:Search&review}}

{{Glossary:Secondary storage}} 

{{Glossary:Sibling}}

{{Glossary:Spaced repetition}}

{{Glossary:Spacing effect}}

{{Glossary:Splitmark}}

{{Glossary:Spreading activation}}

{{Glossary:Stability}}

{{Glossary:Stability increase matrix}}

{{Glossary:Stabilization curve}}

{{Glossary:Startup interval}}

{{Glossary:Startup stability}}

{{Glossary:Subset}}

{{Glossary:Subset review}}

{{Glossary:SuperMemo}}

== T ==

{{Glossary:Task}}

{{Glossary:Tasklist}}

{{Glossary:Template}}

{{Glossary:Topic}}

== U ==

{{Glossary:U-Factor}}

== V ==

{{Glossary:Visual browser}}

{{Glossary:Visual learning}}

== Z ==

{{Glossary:Zoom&trim mode}}
